positive: A stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a gentle crescent moon cradling a pair of intertwined deer antlers and blossoming flora. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, featuring clean, continuous line work with solid, vibrant block coloring (deep midnight blue, forest emerald green, and soft gold accents). Emphasize a strong, elegant silhouette against a light background, perfect for a screen-printed t-shirt. The style should evoke vintage nature lithography meets modern geometric poster art. Soft, even studio lighting, high contrast, crisp edges, scalable vector art, centered composition, high detail.
